public_reputation: Dockside cut-rate assassin imitating omen theatrics badly enough to be dangerous anyway.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Cosmouth, that reads as someone maritime, urbane, and commercially fluid, balancing archive-minded memory with port pragmatism, and the habits of a assassins still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of assassins in and around Coralhaven Port, Cosmouth, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Coralhaven Port, Cosmouth workable through the obligations of assassins while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Cosmouth.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Coralhaven Port, Cosmouth, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of assassins visibly slip.

Silt-Knife Bero needs help with a problem in Coralhaven Port, Cosmouth that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.
